title: Utopia Home Folding Step Stool 9 Inch, Portable Anti Slip Surface for Kids and Adults, Heavy Duty Folding Stool with Carrying Handle, 300 lbs Load Capacity, Pack of 1, White
features: Sturdy Folding Stool – Our Folding Step Stool is everyone’s portable companion built for daily use. It’s perfect for using both indoors and outdoors.
Anti-slip Surface – With a non-slip and textured surface, say goodbye to wobbling and ensure extra grip. Use the folding step with confidence, knowing it’s always secure.

330 lbs Load Capacity – Feel secure with every climb. Our robust folding stool can confidently handle weights of up to 330 lbs (150 kgs), providing a reliable and safe step up for kids and adults alike.
Integrated Carrying Handle – The user-friendly folding stool comes with an integrated carry handle making it easy to carry, transport and unfold whenever the need arises.
Saves Space – With its compact design, slide the folded stool inside a travel bag or place it at any corner of the room with incredible ease.
